docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,995.00 FILED BY WONG, HENDRICK AS TO DEFENDANT OEI, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, HENDRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OEI, PAUL $3,699.75 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,719.75, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED, STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1999, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT OEI, PAUL
BOTH PARTIES APPEARED FOR ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEBTOR REFUSED TO WAIVE POS. OEX OFF CALENDARED.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT OEI, PAUL HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-08-1999 AS TO DEFENDANT OEI, PAUL
